text:
!!{{!!caption}} --- {{!!points}} points

{{||CharacteristicsTable}}

Unit Composition --- 1 Tyrant Guard

{{||$:/templates/biomorphs-rules}}

;Options
*May include up to two additional Tyrant Guard - {{!!points}} points/model
*The unit may replace {{Instinctive Behaviour (Feed)||$:/templates/tooltips}} with {{Instinctive Behaviour (Lurk)||$:/templates/tooltips}} -- //free// 
*Any model may replace a single pair of ''scything talons'' with an {{Impaler Cannon||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 10 points
*Any model may take items from the {{Basic Bio-cannons||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Basic Bio-weapons||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}}, and {{Melee Bio-weapons||$:/templates/tooltips}} lists.
title: Tyrant Guard
creator: Jeanbeaux
special-rules: [[Shieldwall]] [[Fused Skull]] [[Blind Rampage]] [[Instinctive Behaviour (Feed)]] [[Very Bulky]] [[Feel No Pain]] +[sort[title]]
description: ''Special'': //You may include one Tyrant Guard Brood for each [[Hive Tyrant]] (including the [[Swarmlord]]) in your army. These broods do not use up a Force Organisation slot. Otherwise, Tyrant Guard Broods may be taken as Elite choices//
caption: Tyrant Guard Brood
